en.category_description: Request support for internet, network, or device connectivity-related issues.

es.category_description: Solicite soporte para problemas relacionados con internet, red o conectividad de dispositivos.

fr.category_description: Demandez de l’assistance pour les problèmes liés à Internet, au réseau ou à la connectivité des appareils.

ko.category_description: 인터넷 네트워크 또는 기기 연결에 관한 문제 해결을 요청합니다.

en.category_description: Request assistance when internet access is unavailable or disconnected.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the affected device and location details.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia cuando no haya acceso a Internet o la conexión esté interrumpida.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya el dispositivo afectado y la información de ubicación.

fr.category_description: Demandez de l’assistance lorsque l’accès à Internet est indisponible ou interrompu.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure l’appareil concerné et les informations de localisation.

ko.category_description: 인터넷 연결을 할 수 없는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 기기와 위치 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request support for VPN connection or authentication issues.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the device, network, and VPN connection details.

es.category_description: Solicite soporte para problemas de conexión o autenticación VPN.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya el dispositivo, la red y los detalles de la conexión VPN.

fr.category_description: Demandez de l’assistance pour les problèmes de connexion ou d’authentification VPN.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure l’appareil, le réseau et les détails de la connexion VPN.

ko.category_description: VPN 연결을 할 수 없는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 기기와 위치 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request assistance for Wi-Fi or wireless network connection issues.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the Wi-Fi network name, device, and location.

es.category_description: Solicite asistencia para problemas de conexión Wi-Fi o red inalámbrica.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya el nombre de la red Wi-Fi, el dispositivo y la ubicación.

fr.category_description: Demandez de l’assistance pour les problèmes de connexion Wi-Fi ou réseau sans fil.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure le nom du réseau Wi-Fi, l’appareil et la localisation.

ko.category_description: Wi-Fi 혹은 무선 연결 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 Wi-Fi 혹은 무선 연결 기기와 위치 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request support for slow, unstable, or unresponsive network connections.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the affected network or device details.

es.category_description: Solicite soporte para conexiones de red lentas, inestables o sin respuesta.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya los detalles de la red o del dispositivo afectado.

fr.category_description: Demandez de l’assistance pour des connexions réseau lentes, instables ou non réactives.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les détails du réseau ou de l’appareil concerné.

ko.category_description: 인터넷 네트워크 혹은 기기 연결이 불안정하거나 응답이 없는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 점검이 필요한 네트워크 정보나 기기 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request support for firewall restrictions or IP address changes or additions.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the device information and required IP or firewall details.

es.category_description: Solicite soporte para restricciones de firewall o cambios o adiciones de direcciones IP.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya la información del dispositivo y los detalles de IP o firewall requeridos.

fr.category_description: Demandez de l’assistance pour les restrictions de pare-feu ou les modifications ou ajouts d’adresses IP.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les informations de l’appareil et les détails IP ou pare-feu requis.

ko.category_description: 방화벽으로 인한 문제나 IP 추가, 이동이 필요한 경우 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 해결이 필요한 PC 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.
